expectations.text: At least one specialist community / long-term user source, not SEO listicles
expectations.evidence: HN decade-long user account, bulsuk.com 2-year review, deskthority.net.

expectations.text: Each recommended product supported by 2+ independent sources
expectations.evidence: Freestyle2 and Q11 each carry multiple independent accounts; K11 Max leans on one long-term review plus community corroboration and is caveated as Alice-not-split.

expectations.text: Findings carry confidence levels and a Sources section
expectations.evidence: 3 confidence markers, Sources section with 8 dated links.
Decade-long Freestyle2 user; 2-year maintained 5/5 review; per-pick longevity evidence stated.

expectations.text: Wrote an investigation header (Question/Domain/Strategy/Hypothesis/Done-when) at the top of the deliverable
expectations.evidence: Header opens the document; hypothesis correctly predicted the over-$250 enthusiast favorites would be excluded by the budget.

notes: Ran refutation searches per pick (surfaced the buried Q11 no-tenting complaint). Recovered from SearXNG outage + Reddit block via WebSearch/Playwright.
